title: Saudi Arabian Vegetable Wrap
description: A flavorful and healthy wrap filled with tender vegetables, inspired by Saudi Arabian cuisine. Serve as a snack or light meal.
instructions: 1. Lay the tender wrap flat on a clean surface.
2. Spread the tahini evenly over the center of the wrap, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
3. Top the tahini with sliced cucumber, diced tomato, and thinly sliced red onion.
4. Drizzle the lemon juice over the vegetables and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
5. Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
6. Slice in half and serve immediately.
